_doc: World/ground loose-spawn item resolution for build_world_spawns.py. itemSlugAliases maps world-prop (game_*) blueprint ids to their catalog item id/slug; excludeBlueprints force-drops blueprints that resolve to an item but are NOT player-collectible loose loot (hazards, spawners, test/contract). Blueprints that don't resolve to a real item page are skipped automatically (per the 'items that map to item pages' scope).
